executionHistory.evidence: Artifact-only fix: added 8 trace-ID-bearing DoD bullets (SCN-022-01/02/03/04 in Scope 1; SCN-022-06 in Scope 2; SCN-022-11 in Scope 3; SCN-022-12/14 in Scope 4) to specs/022-operational-resilience/scopes.md with raw go test output and source-file pointers; enriched all 33 Test Plan rows in Scopes 1-4 with concrete *_test.go file paths so extract_path_candidates succeeds; generated specs/022-operational-resilience/scenario-manifest.json covering all 14 SCN-022-* scenarios; appended BUG-022-002 cross-reference section to specs/022-operational-resilience/report.md. No production code changed.

Underlying behavior tests for SCN-022-01/02/03/04/06/11/12/14 all PASS: 7 config tests (TestValidate_DBPoolConfig_Valid, TestValidate_DBMaxConns_Invalid, TestValidate_DBMinConns_EqualsMaxConns, TestValidate_DBMaxConns_Missing, TestValidate_DBMinConns_Missing, TestValidate_ShutdownTimeoutS_Missing, TestValidate_MLHealthCacheTTLS_Missing, TestValidate_DBMinConns_ExceedsMaxConns) PASS in internal/config; 3 capture tests (TestCaptureHandler_DBHealthy_ContinuesProcessing, TestCaptureHandler_DBUnavailable_Returns503, TestCaptureHandler_NilDB_Returns503) PASS in internal/api; 16 scheduler tests (13 TestRun*Job_OverlapGuard + TestCronConcurrencyGuard_AllGroupsIndependent + AllEightGroupsIndependent + RaceDetectorClean) PASS in internal/scheduler; 6 shutdown tests (TestShutdownAll_ParallelSubscriberStop, TestShutdownAll_NilSubscribersHandled, TestRunWithTimeout_CompletesBeforeBudget, TestRunWithTimeout_ExceedsBudget, TestStop_CronStopBounded, TestStop_WgWaitBounded) PASS across cmd/core and internal/scheduler; 3 dead-letter tests (TestSynthesisDeliveryFailure_RoutesToDeadLetter, _BelowMaxDeliver_Naks, _PublishFails_Naks) PASS in internal/pipeline. 35 named tests PASS total. Output recorded inline in report.md > Test Evidence.
